players.name: OGRuiz
players.experienceVerdict: low sample on this hero (outside the tracked pool)

flags: our damage is 4/5 magical — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of it

notes: You had the bodies (5v4) and it still went 1-2 — that's a fight you should win with the man up.
Mr_Meat31 (support) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
Their main damage was Grux (18k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 2 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane), Goldilocks324 (jungle→midlane).

coaching.headline: GRIM.exe went 17/1 and the map followed — objectives 22–9, and every game-defining fight was won on top of a prize.
coaching.team: This is the blueprint: you fought where the prizes were — their outer tower at 13.7 (won 4–1), Mini Prime at 16.3 (won 4–0), your Fangtooth at 24.4 (3–2), their inner tower at 26.6 (4–1) — and converted into Orb Prime at 21 plus two Genesis cores. Two sharpens for a clean win: the 21.8 fight at your inner tower went 1–2 with a 5v4 man advantage (a fight you win if the alive teammates arrive), and only 2/5 of you itemized armor into Grux's 18k physical.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Fighting on top of objectives instead of in the open — the 13.7 tower fight and the 16.3 Mini Prime fight turned kills into the 22–9 objective lead that ended it.

perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: GRIM.exe 17/1/3 with 1387 hero damage/min against your 1067 norm — one death all game while the team fed you fights on objectives. This was the win condition; repeat it.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Phase 1/3/18 with 12 wards against your 9 norm — textbook enabling. One note: when the support lane turned late (yours early, theirs late), you were pinned losing during the 21.8 inner-tower fight — shove and leave earlier so you can join those.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Serath 8/3/3 at 11.3 CS/min against your 6.2 norm, and the 16.3 Mini Prime fight went 4–0 with you in it. One sharpen: at 21.8 you were alive and never joined the inner-tower fight the team lost 1–2 with a man up.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Gadget held a lane that read theirs early to even late against Gideon and showed for the won fights at 13.7 and 24.4. Damage ran 508/min against your 765 norm — with the team this far ahead, spend more of it in those objective fights.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Steel 4/3/7 on a three-game hero with 43,712 damage soaked — the lane read even early, yours late, and you played it exactly that way. Solid frontline game.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Your damage is 4/5 magical — predictable; one magic-resist item answers most of it. Mix in a physical threat.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

ourKits.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
ourKits.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
ourKits.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Dread Nova stun → Ether Crystal push/lift → Particle Shredder channel → Synaptic Obliterator beams
enemyKits.winCondition: poke from max range and zone with the crystal
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to protect his stationary channel
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Dread Nova; dive him during the immobile ult channel

enemyKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
enemyKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
enemyKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first
